name: ComplianceOracleContract

methods.name: initialize
methods.desc:
Initialize the compliance oracle
PRODUCTION READY: Configurable thresholds and validation

methods.name: updateSanctionsList
methods.desc:
Update sanctions list (authority only)
PRODUCTION READY: Proper validation and timestamp tracking

methods.name: changeAuthority
methods.desc:
Change oracle authority (authority only)
PRODUCTION READY: Governance mechanism for authority changes

methods.name: updateAddressThresholds
methods.desc:
Update address length thresholds (authority only)
PRODUCTION READY: Allows threshold updates with validation

methods.name: updateRiskThreshold
methods.desc:
Update risk threshold (authority only)
PRODUCTION READY: Allows risk threshold updates with validation

methods.name: isSanctioned
methods.desc:
Check if address is sanctioned
PRODUCTION READY: Implements proper sanctions checking

desc:
Compliance Oracle Contract
Handles sanctions screening and KYC verification

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Initial sanctions hash cannot be empty
Maximum address length must be greater than minimum
Minimum address length must be greater than 0
New authority address cannot be empty
New authority must be different from current
New sanctions hash cannot be empty
Only current oracle authority can change authority
Only oracle authority can update risk threshold
Only oracle authority can update sanctions list
Only oracle authority can update thresholds
Only oracle authority can verify addresses
Risk threshold must be between 1 and 100
can only call when not creating
